positive: A vibrant, minimalist illustration featuring a stylized crescent moon embraced by blooming geometric florals. The scene is set against a deep indigo cosmic background, utilizing a palette of ethereal teal, golden yellow, and muted sage green. The style should be modern celestial etching mixed with Art Nouveau fluidity, rendered with clean, thick line work and strong silhouettes. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed to look fantastic as a repeat apparel pattern or large graphic tee print, ensuring high contrast and perfect readability when scaled. Focus on symmetrical beauty and clean negative space.
negative: photorealistic, low detail, blur, artifacts, text, watermark, dirty, grainy, multiple subjects, messy, bad anatomy, amateur, cropped, logo, trademark
